titleStmt.title: SII 40.265: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 265. (A.R. No. B. 310 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Sakalēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1445, Svabhānu, Chaitra, śu. 5, [Monday], corresponding to 1524 A.D., March 10. However the week day was Thursday.

Mentions the descendants of Mallurāju, the Karaṇam of Māvuṇḍala. Records the construction of a temple to the god Sāgarēśvara, and excavation of a tank at the village by Nāgarāja, for the merit of his parents Peddirāju and Peddamma and his guru Muḍigoṇḍa-Manumanārādhya. Further it mentions some gifts made by chief of the Koṇḍavīdu fort.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁ
bulu 1445 Agunēṁṭi svabhānu saṁvatsara caitra śu 5 sō
kauṁḍinyagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtra yajuśśākhādyāyulaina
māvuṁḍala karaṇaṁ mallurāju komāruṁḍu nāgarāju Ā
yana komāruṁḍu peddirājunakunnu peddamakunnu
mārukumārasvāmimukhaṁ 3 . luṁbole . Amaraya
nāmu . Aṁnaya . vīraya . musaṁnnaya . pinnaya
yī Ārvuralōnu nāgarāju tama taṁḍri peddirāju
kunnu tamatalli peddamakuṁnnu tama guruvulu mu
digoṁḍḍamanumanārādhyulakuṁnnu tana Aṁnna
dammulakunnu dha¨rmmādhamugānu koṁḍavīṭi paḍuma
ḍi māmaṁḍala sāgarēśvara liṁggamuguḍiki rātikha
ṁḍḍapuraṁ nīvūridakṣiṇapu ceruvuṁnu kaṭiṁci ko
ṁḍavīṭi duggādhipati cētanu guḍitū¨rpu ceruvulō
nu kēsaripāṭi kha 1 kṣētramuṁnu Ippiṁci Ācaṁdrā
¨rkasthāIgāniccenu maṁggaḷamahā śrī
śrīṁjēyu
Digital edition of SII 40.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
